description.overview: The Alaskan Klee Kai looks like a miniature Husky but is a distinct breed developed in Alaska in the 1970s.
description.temperament: Klee Kai are intelligent and loyal to family but reserved with strangers. They can be vocal.
description.health: Generally healthy. May be prone to heart problems and thyroid issues.
description.exercise: Moderate to high energy. Need daily exercise and mental stimulation.

best_for: Those wanting a small, Husky-like dog
verdict.summary: Mini Husky look-alikes with big personalities. Klee Kai are loyal and intelligent but reserved with strangers. Need experienced owners.
